The latest update is out from ClearVue Technologies ( (AU:CPV) ).

ClearVue Technologies has applied to the ASX for quotation of 1,000,000 new fully paid ordinary shares. The shares were issued on 17 April 2026 to a consultant as consideration for corporate advisory services, modestly expanding the company’s capital base while formalising equity-based compensation for advisory support.

The move underscores ClearVue’s use of scrip to pay for strategic and corporate advice, which may help preserve cash while potentially diluting existing shareholders. The additional quoted securities could improve trading liquidity in CPV shares, and signal ongoing corporate development activities supported by external advisers.

More about ClearVue Technologies

ClearVue Technologies Limited is an Australia-listed company trading under the code CPV on the ASX. The company engages consultants to provide corporate advisory services and uses its equity to compensate such advisers, reflecting an approach that aligns external support with shareholder interests.

data.title: ACSL Grants New Employee Stock Options to Align Pay With Performance
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

ACSL Ltd. ( (JP:6232) ) has shared an announcement.

ACSL Ltd. has approved the issuance of stock acquisition rights as stock options for 14 employees, allocating a total of 220 units that can be converted into 22,000 shares of common stock. The exercise price has been set at 170,400 yen per stock acquisition right, equivalent to 1,704 yen per share, underscoring a targeted effort to align employee incentives with shareholder value and strengthen long-term retention.

The move signals ACSL’s intention to foster stronger employee commitment at a time when competition for skilled talent in advanced technology fields is intensifying. By linking compensation more closely to the company’s share performance, ACSL aims to motivate key personnel to drive growth and innovation, which could enhance its competitive position and create a tighter alignment of interests among staff, management, and investors.

More about ACSL Ltd.

ACSL Ltd. operates in the technology sector, focusing on providing unmanned systems and related solutions. The company’s business model typically involves developing and deploying advanced hardware and software platforms that support industrial and commercial applications, positioning it to benefit from growing demand for automation and robotics.

Current Market Cap: Yen33.49B

data.title: 1414 Degrees Issues 93.7 Million New Shares to Support Clean-Energy Growth Platform
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

1414 Degrees Ltd. ( (AU:14D) ) has issued an announcement.

1414 Degrees Ltd has issued 93,672,099 fully paid ordinary shares without a prospectus, confirming it remains compliant with continuous disclosure and financial reporting obligations under the Corporations Act. The company also stated it is not aware of any excluded information that would need to be disclosed to investors in relation to this share issue.

The share issuance supports 1414 Degrees’ broader strategy of developing its integrated clean-energy and decarbonisation platform, anchored by the Aurora Energy Precinct in South Australia. With grid access, development approvals and a near-term 140 MW/280 MWh battery storage project, the company is positioning itself as an infrastructure and technology provider to large-scale, low-emissions power users, including potential data centre and industrial customers.

More about 1414 Degrees Ltd.

1414 Degrees Ltd is an Australian clean-energy and industrial decarbonisation company focused on grid-scale energy storage, industrial heat, hydrogen production and advanced battery materials. It owns the 16km² Aurora Energy Precinct in South Australia, positioned within the Upper Spencer Gulf Renewable Energy Zone to supply firmed renewable power to data centres and other energy-intensive industries. The company’s core technologies, including SiBrick, SiBox, SiPHyR and SiNTL, use silicon-based systems to store, convert and enhance energy across multiple sectors.

Average Trading Volume: 1,055,223

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: A$8.74M

data.title: Unidata Reopens Board of Statutory Auditors Slate Deadline to Boost Shareholder Participation
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Unidata S.P.A. ( (IT:UD) ) has shared an update.

Unidata S.p.A., the Rome-based telecoms, cloud and IoT provider listed on Euronext Milan’s STAR Segment, has called a shareholders’ meeting for 11 May 2026 to appoint a new Board of Statutory Auditors. After the original 16 April 2026 deadline, only one slate of candidates was filed by majority shareholder Uninvest S.r.l., triggering a regulated extension.

Under Italian market rules, the company has reopened the window for submitting additional slates until 19 April 2026, cutting the minimum shareholding threshold in half to 1.25%. The move is intended to encourage broader shareholder participation in shaping the oversight body, with all slates and related documents to be made publicly available via Unidata’s registered office, authorized storage system and corporate website.

The most recent analyst rating on (IT:UD) stock is a Buy with a EUR4.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Unidata S.P.A. stock, see the IT:UD Stock Forecast page.

More about Unidata S.P.A.

Unidata S.p.A. is an Italian telecommunications, cloud and IoT operator founded in 1985 and listed on the Euronext Milan – STAR Segment. The company operates an 8,500 km and growing fiber network, a wireless network and a proprietary data center, serving over 31,000 business, wholesale and residential customers with ultra-broadband, VoIP, cloud and smart home and smart city IoT solutions.

Average Trading Volume: 73,828

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Sell

Current Market Cap: €84.63M

Robert Walters ( (GB:RWA) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Robert Walters plc, a global specialist in professional recruitment, provides talent placement and staffing services across a range of industries and seniority levels. The company focuses on mid to senior-level appointments in major international markets, supporting corporate clients with tailored recruitment solutions.

The company has disclosed that 6,374 share options held by Chief Executive Officer Toby Fowlston under its 2023 Save As You Earn scheme have been cancelled. The cancellation, recorded as a single off-market transaction on 15 April 2026, modestly adjusts the CEO’s potential equity-based remuneration but does not alter the existing ordinary share capital in issue.

The most recent analyst rating on (GB:RWA) stock is a Hold with a £100.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Robert Walters stock, see the GB:RWA Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on RWA Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, RWA is a Neutral.

The score is primarily weighed down by deteriorating financial performance (shrinking revenue, compressed margins, and losses) and a clearly bearish technical trend (price below all key moving averages and negative MACD). Positive operating/free cash flow and a very high dividend yield provide some support, but the sharp decline in free cash flow and loss-making profile keep the overall risk elevated.

To see Spark’s full report on RWA stock, click here.

Robert Walters plc is an international professional recruitment firm that specializes in placing experienced professionals into permanent, contract, and interim roles across multiple sectors. data.title: IwaiCosmo Holdings Forecasts Record Profits on Surge in U.S. Equity Revenue
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

IwaiCosmo Holdings, Inc. ( (JP:8707) ) has issued an update.

IwaiCosmo Holdings reported preliminary consolidated results for the fiscal year ended March 31, 2026, showing a strong jump in operating revenue to ¥32.26 billion and profit attributable to owners of parent to ¥10.44 billion. Earnings per share rose to ¥444.61, up 55.3% from the prior year, reflecting a substantial improvement in profitability.

The company said revenue grew 25.3% year on year, primarily driven by higher U.S. equity-related income, helping operating, ordinary, and net profit all surpass last year’s levels and reach record highs. Ordinary profit has now remained positive for 54 consecutive quarters, underscoring the resilience of its securities business despite market volatility, though management continues to refrain from issuing earnings forecasts due to sensitivity to economic and market conditions.

More about IwaiCosmo Holdings, Inc.

IwaiCosmo Holdings Co., Ltd. is a Japan-based financial services group listed on the Tokyo Stock Exchange Prime Market under stock code 8707. Through its core unit Iwai Cosmo Securities, the group focuses on securities brokerage and investment services, with a notable emphasis on trading in U.S. equities as a key earnings driver.

Average Trading Volume: 128,553

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: Yen87.5B

data.title: Core Concept Technologies Weighs Implications of SIGMAXYZ Share Acquisition
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Core Concept Technologies Inc. ( (JP:4371) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Core Concept Technologies has disclosed that it became aware of SIGMAXYZ Holdings’ acquisition of its shares only after SIGMAXYZ’s public announcement and had not received prior formal notice. While the two companies share a general understanding about potential cooperation, they have not yet agreed on any capital or business alliance.

The board of Core Concept Technologies plans to carefully evaluate any formal proposal from SIGMAXYZ, particularly if the stake rises to a level that triggers equity-method accounting and affects management strategy or share liquidity. The company emphasized it will continue pursuing its existing business operations and performance targets for the fiscal year ending December 2026, while making any required disclosures in a timely manner.

More about Core Concept Technologies Inc.

Core Concept Technologies Inc., listed on the Tokyo Stock Exchange Growth Market, operates in the technology sector and is headquartered in Tokyo. The company focuses on digital solutions and related services, targeting growth through innovation and the enhancement of corporate value for its shareholders.

data.title: Pure Foods Tasmania Sets 2026 AGM to Vote on Governance and Capital Raisings
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Pure Foods Tasmania Ltd. ( (AU:PFT) ) has issued an announcement.

Pure Foods Tasmania Limited has called its Annual General Meeting for 21 May 2026 in Hobart, where shareholders will receive the 2025 financial, directors’ and auditors’ reports and vote on key governance matters, including the adoption of the remuneration report and the re-election of director Malcolm McAully. Investors will also be asked to ratify a prior capital raising and approve several proposed share and option issues, including consideration shares linked to the Elato transaction and placements to an investor referred to as BFA, moves that collectively refresh placement capacity and support the company’s funding and acquisition strategy, with potential dilution and strategic implications for existing shareholders.

More about Pure Foods Tasmania Ltd.

Pure Foods Tasmania Limited is an Australia-based food company listed on the ASX, focused on producing and marketing premium Tasmanian food products. The company targets consumers seeking high-quality, locally sourced offerings and relies on equity markets to support its growth and acquisition activities.
